releaseNotes:
• Unified journal capture with optional mood (colored 1–5 picker) on toolkit logs, future self, NVC, refactoring, and center of gravity

• Toolkit category updates, meditation/breath UI polish, Visuals removed from bottom nav
• Build footer shows version name and code
